title: euphrasia collina subsp. tasmanica
intro: Euphrasia collina subsp. tasmanica, also known as Tasmanian eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Euphrasia collina subsp. tasmanica include its ability to soothe eye irritations and infections, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Euphrasia collina subsp. tasmanica can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or eye drops, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
